title: stenogyne calycosa
intro: Stenogyne calycosa, a flowering plant native to Hawaii, is a member of the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of volatile oils. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reduced inflammation, relief from respiratory issues, and improved digestion. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Stenogyne calycosa is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a carrier oil.
